programs.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programs.desc: Rachael teams up with her friend Dr. Will Li, an author and medical scientist whose work focuses on eating for well-being. Together, they prepare a meal of grilled sea bass and sauteed baby bok choy.

programs.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programs.desc: Waking up early one morning, the Dokbakz are all hungry and ready to head out for breakfast. But when they arrive at the restaurant, they are met with an unexpected surprise.

programs.title: I Was Octomom: The Natalie Suleman Story
programs.desc: In January 2009, Natalie gave birth to eight babies--the first human to accomplish this miraculous feat. However, instead of being celebrated for a record-breaking event, she faced harsh scrutiny.

programs.title: Zombie House Flipping
programs.desc: This lakefront neighborhood zombie seems like a great deal, with its massive swimming pool and vintage floors. But with an unexpected roof replacement, their huge payday may just drown in the deep end.

programs.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programs.desc: Rachael teams up with her friend Dr. Will Li, an author and medical scientist whose work focuses on eating for well-being. Together, they prepare a meal of grilled sea bass and sauteed baby bok choy.

programs.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programs.sub_title: Balsamic & Soy Braised Brisket & Apple Honey Cake
programs.desc: If you're looking for a showstopper dinner-party dish, this is the one. Balsamic and soy-glazed brisket is always a crowd-pleaser. It is fork-tender but with a deep, rich flavour.
